title: HOT BARGAINS 100 X 18oz Disposable Salad Bowls with Lids + 100 X Forks + 100 X Spoons Wooden Takeaway Eco Friendly (18oz / 500ml)
features: Takeaway Salad Bowl with lids are Bio Salad Containers for a mess-free and portable serving solution.
Use premium paper, Kraft salad containers are easy to recycle to reduce your impact on the environment.
Kraft salad bowl + lids are microwave and freezer safe
Built from high quality paper, these durable containers are designed with sturdy walls to securely contain your foods. Ideal for use as a portable salad container!
Ideal for Street food Packaging, Takeaway Business, Restaurant, Outdoor and Indoor Event's, Parties and Kitchens
100 Salad Containers & Lids includes with 100 Forks + 100 X Spoons Wooden
description: Product Description Salad Bowl or Salad Container for Street Food This salad bowl is made of thick kraft paper with a coating to prevent contents from leaking. This construction ensures superior durability for quality, single-service use. Use it for salad service at your restaurant, cafe, or cafeteria, or for serving poke bowls at your trendy bistro. Available Sizes are 18oz, 26oz, 35oz and 38oz. 2ply Table Paper Napkins 33cm x 33cm Napkins are made of 100% virgin pulp. This makes it very soft without loosing its core properties such as strength and absorbency. The pulp is sourced from well-managed environmentally sustained forests. Packed with care under the highest standard of hygiene. Sterilised at 450 Degree Celsius - Premium Quality 2oz Hinged Sauce Pots Featuring a classic clear colour and convenient 2oz size Hinged Sauce Pots, this soufflé/portion cup makes the ideal addition to buffet lines, tasting sessions, take-out, or in-house restaurant use. Use it to serve salad dressings, condiments, sauces, or samples! It’s great for kitchen-to-table use when filled with your signature sauces or classic condiments while offering complete product visibility. Wooden Cutlery Set - Spoon, Knife & Fork These utensils are made of beautiful wood, with a subtle colour that looks great in higher-end and casual environments alike. Best of all, you won't have to sacrifice durability for this all-natural product, as these utensils are sturdy enough for entrees and cooked vegetables. Brown Kraft Paper Bags, Flat handled This bag's twisted handles make all purchases easy for customers to carry. In addition, its rectangular foundation allows it to stand alone for convenient packaging. This bag is perfect for groceries or other retail items and takeaways.
